governance.decisionScope: Decisions about scope, priorities, investment, faculty participation, ongoing ownership and any escalation that cannot be resolved within an individual delivery step.
governance.businessAsUsualOwnershipNote: Step 6 will confirm the enduring ownership of the evidence packs, refresh timetable, interpretation guidance, access route and course review process. The likely model requires clear central ownership of the evidence and pack production, faculty ownership of local use and follow-through, and oversight of graduate futures actions through the Academic Standards and Quality Enhancement Subcommittee of Education Committee and existing quality enhancement monitoring.

partners: Planning, analytics and relevant institutional data colleagues
Power BI or equivalent data visualisation support
deliveryPartners.contribution: Provide, interpret, visualise and maintain the graduate futures evidence, with appropriate caveats and responsible-use guidance.
Agree local participation, support course teams to use the packs and workshops, own course-level interpretation and route agreed actions through normal department and faculty processes.
Help make the self-run workshop clear, developmental, proportionate and connected to practical enhancement support.

partners: Student recruitment and open-day colleagues, where course claims are used
deliveryPartners.contribution: Support responsible use of course-confirmed, evidence-linked claims in agreed student-facing and applicant-facing contexts.

partners: Academic Standards and Quality Enhancement Subcommittee of Education Committee
deliveryPartners.contribution: Monitor whether agreed graduate futures actions enter existing quality enhancement processes and whether they are progressing, while course, department and faculty owners remain responsible for delivery.

businessAsUsualOwnershipNote: Step 6 will confirm the enduring ownership of the evidence packs, refresh timetable, interpretation guidance, access route and course review process. The likely model requires clear central ownership of the evidence and pack production, faculty ownership of local use and follow-through, and oversight of graduate futures actions through the Academic Standards and Quality Enhancement Subcommittee of Education Committee and existing quality enhancement monitoring.
